items.name: parse
items.doc: Parse config from TOML string content.

items.name: load
items.doc: Load config from a project directory (reads `proj/rulestools.toml`).

items.name: is_enabled
items.doc: Check if a specific check is enabled. Defaults to true if not configured.

items.name: param_i64
items.signature: pub fn param_i64(&self, key: &str, default: i64) -> i64
items.doc: Get a parameter value for a check, with a default fallback.

items.name: param_str
items.signature: pub fn param_str(&self, key: &str, default: &str) -> String
